overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with blonde hair and a studded jacket sitting on a bench at a foggy Night City metro station. The camera performs a slow cinematic orbit around the stationary character, revealing neon-lit storefronts, holographic advertisements, and the dystopian urban architecture while other pedestrians move through the platform.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered metro platform with yellow seating

events.description: character turns head to observe a pedestrian walking away in the distance
character turns to look at the blue-haired companion sitting nearby

agents.ego_description: sitting on a yellow metro bench, turning head to observe surroundings and the departing pedestrian

notable_agents.action: blue-haired character sitting on the bench next to ego, looking at a handheld device

entered.detail: long yellow bench with green metal armrests where the character is seated
tall cylindrical white light fixture illuminating the platform
elevated concrete train track structure with metal railings spanning the background
tall skyscrapers with illuminated windows and glowing signage visible through the fog
illuminated digital sign displaying the number 05 hanging from the overpass

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a foggy Night City metro platform at night. The character sits on a yellow bench while a blue-haired companion sits nearby. A tall light pole stands in the center background beneath the elevated metro tracks, with neon-lit skyscrapers visible in the distance through the haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: metro platform with neon-lit commercial storefronts visible in the underpass

events.description: blue-haired companion stands up from the bench and begins to walk away
camera begins a slow clockwise orbit around the seated character

agents.ego_description: remains seated on the bench, watching the companion leave before looking around the platform

notable_agents.action: blue-haired character walking away down the platform toward the neon-lit underpass

entered.detail: commercial shops with bright pink and red neon lighting located under the overpass
large illuminated advertisement display showing a muscular figure

segments.scene_description: The blue-haired companion stands up and walks away down the platform toward the neon-lit storefronts under the overpass. The camera begins to orbit around the seated character, revealing more of the station's commercial area and a large holographic billboard while the light pole shifts to the left of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: metro platform with prominent holographic advertising and cyan neon lighting

events.description: camera reveals large holographic advertisement board with a glowing figure
pedestrian in dark clothing walks past the bench from right to left

agents.ego_description: sitting alone on the bench, occasionally adjusting posture while the camera circles to the right side

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing walking past the bench along the platform

entered.detail: large illuminated billboard displaying a shirtless muscular man with text overlay
horizontal cyan neon light running along the facade of the building
black public waste bin next to the bench

segments.scene_description: The camera continues its orbit to the right side of the character, bringing a large holographic advertisement into close view. The platform's neon lighting becomes more prominent with cyan light strips illuminating the storefronts. A pedestrian walks past the bench as the metro overpass and light pole move out of view behind the camera.

scene_state.functional_zone: metro platform with palm trees and distant city skyline visible

events.description: camera reveals palm trees and distant skyscrapers as it moves to the front of the character
camera completes the orbit, returning to the original side of the platform

agents.ego_description: remains seated, now viewed from the front-left angle, with the holographic advertisement visible directly behind

entered.detail: tall palm tree visible against the night sky beyond the platform
tall buildings with illuminated windows visible in the background fog

segments.scene_description: The camera completes its circular path, moving to the front and left side of the character. The holographic billboard is now positioned directly behind the seated character, and palm trees become visible against the night sky. The light pole and metro overpass come back into view as the camera returns to its starting side, completing the cinematic orbit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a slow, cinematic orbit around a stationary character that begins at a foggy metro platform and gradually reveals the neon-drenched commercial landscape of Night City. It begins with the character seated on a yellow bench beside a blue-haired companion, with a tall light pole and distant skyscrapers visible through the haze. As the companion stands and walks away toward the storefronts, the camera starts to circle the character, shifting the light pole to the left and bringing a large holographic billboard into view. The orbit continues to the right, where cyan light strips illuminate the station's commercial area and a pedestrian passes by, causing the metro overpass to slide behind the camera. Finally, the movement completes its circular path to the front and left, positioning the holographic advertisement directly behind the character and revealing palm trees against the night sky before returning to the original side of the platform.
